name: io.github.nirholas/robinhood-mcp
title: Robinhood Crypto
description: Robinhood Crypto Trading API for AI agents: quotes, holdings, orders read-only; opt-in trading.

environmentVariables.name: ROBINHOOD_CRYPTO_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key from your Robinhood crypto account settings (robinhood.com/account/crypto, web classic only).

environmentVariables.name: ROBINHOOD_CRYPTO_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Base64-encoded 32-byte Ed25519 private seed whose public key is registered with Robinhood. Generate one with `npx robinhood-keygen`.

environmentVariables.name: ROBINHOOD_CRYPTO_API_VERSION
environmentVariables.description: API version: "v1" (default) or "v2". v2 adds fee-tier data to accounts and orders.

environmentVariables.name: ROBINHOOD_CRYPTO_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the API host. Defaults to https://trading.robinhood.com.

tradingServer.note: A second, explicitly opt-in server ships in the same package as bin `robinhood-mcp-trading`. MCP clients do not launch it by default. It requires ROBINHOOD_CRYPTO_ENABLE_TRADING=1 and enforces a per-order USD cap (ROBINHOOD_CRYPTO_MAX_ORDER_USD, default 100), an optional symbol allowlist, and a per-call confirm gate. Robinhood publishes no sandbox: every order is real money.

io.modelcontextprotocol.registry/publish.notRobinhoodChain: This server targets the Robinhood brokerage Crypto Trading API (trading.robinhood.com). For Robinhood Chain (L2, chain ID 4663), see io.github.nirholas/hood-mcp.
